heading: Omitted
label: 661 to 678 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 661 to 678, relating to Territory of Hawaii, were omitted in view of admission of Hawaii into the Union.Section 661, act , No. 55, § 1, , provided that Congress of the United States shall enact special laws for management and disposition of public lands.July 7, 189830 Stat. 750Section 662, , , which declared to be property of Hawaiian Government portion of public domain known prior to , as Crown land.act Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 9931 Stat. 161April 30, 1900Section 663, acts , (b), ; , ; , , defined “public lands”, “commissioner”, “land board”, and “person”, and incorporated by reference certain other defined terms.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 73(a)31 Stat. 154Apr. 2, 1908, ch. 12435 Stat. 56July 9, 1921, ch. 42, § 30442 Stat. 116Section 664, acts , ; , ; , ; , , declared that laws of Hawaii relating to public lands, settlement of boundaries and issuance of patents on land commission awards, shall continue in force until Congress shall otherwise provide.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 73(c)31 Stat. 154Apr. 2, 1908, ch. 12435 Stat. 56May 27, 1910, ch. 258, § 536 Stat. 444July 9, 1921, ch. 42, § 30442 Stat. 117Section 664a, , , ratified Hawaiian realty transactions consummated on or before .act Sept. 26, 1941, ch. 426, § 155 Stat. 734November 25, 1941Section 664b, , , provided that realty transaction so ratified shall be deemed and held to be perfect and valid from day of date thereof.act Sept. 26, 1941, ch. 426, § 255 Stat. 734Section 665, acts , ; , ; , ; , ; , , , prescribed terms and conditions of leases on public lands.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 73(d)31 Stat. 154Apr. 2, 1908, ch. 12435 Stat. 56May 27, 1910, ch. 258, § 536 Stat. 444July 9, 1921, ch. 42, § 30442 Stat. 117Pub.
